name: IdsIndvBeCchgRplcLoad

text.value: WITH Tfrm_VrsnId AS (SELECT S.INDV_BE_CCHG_SK AS INDV_BE_CCHG_RPLC_SK, S.INDV_BE_KEY, S.CCHG_STRT_YR_MO_SK, S.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, S.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_PRI_SK AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_PRI_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_SEC_SK AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SEC_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_TRTY_SK AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_TRTY_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_4TH_SK AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4TH_SK, S.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_5TH_SK AS CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5TH_SK, S.CCHG_END_YR_MO_SK, S.CCHG_CT, @{pipeline().parameters.VersionId} AS VRSN_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsIndvBeCchgRplcLoad AS S ) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.INDV_BE_CCHG_RPLC AS T USING Tfrm_VrsnId AS tfrm ON T.INDV_BE_CCHG_RPLC_SK = tfrm.INDV_BE_CCHG_RPLC_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.INDV_BE_KEY = tfrm.INDV_BE_KEY, T.CCHG_STRT_YR_MO_SK = tfrm.CCHG_STRT_YR_MO_SK, T.PRCS_YR_MO_SK = tfrm.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = tfrm.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = tfrm.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = tfrm.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_PRI_SK = tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_PRI_SK, T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SEC_SK = tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SEC_SK, T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_TRTY_SK = tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_TRTY_SK, T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4TH_SK = tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4TH_SK, T.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5TH_SK = tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5TH_SK, T.CCHG_END_YR_MO_SK = tfrm.CCHG_END_YR_MO_SK, T.CCHG_CT = tfrm.CCHG_CT, T.VRSN_ID = tfrm.VRSN_ID WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (INDV_BE_CCHG_RPLC_SK, INDV_BE_KEY, CCHG_STRT_YR_MO_SK, PRCS_YR_MO_SK, SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_PRI_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SEC_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_TRTY_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4TH_SK, CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5TH_SK, CCHG_END_YR_MO_SK, CCHG_CT, VRSN_ID) VALUES (tfrm.INDV_BE_CCHG_RPLC_SK, tfrm.INDV_BE_KEY, tfrm.CCHG_STRT_YR_MO_SK, tfrm.PRCS_YR_MO_SK, tfrm.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, tfrm.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, tfrm.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_PRI_SK, tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_SEC_SK, tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_TRTY_SK, tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_4TH_SK, tfrm.CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP_RPLC_5TH_SK, tfrm.CCHG_END_YR_MO_SK, tfrm.CCHG_CT, tfrm.VRSN_ID);

Description:
CALLED BY: CblTalnCchgLoadSeq

PROCESSING:  Loads data into CCHG_MULT_CAT_GRP table and rejected records into a Rej file. 
                                                                
     
MODIFICATIONS:
                                                                                                                                                                                                                   DATASTAGE               CODE                           DATE
DEVELOPER             DATE                PROJECT                        DESCRIPTION                                                                                      ENVIRONMENT          REVIEWER                 REVIEW
-----------------------------    ----------------------     ------------------------------        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------  ------------------------------    ------------------------------       --------------------
Goutham K                11/13/2021         US-500022                    New Job to Load RPLC Table                                                                IntegrateDev2       Reddy Sanam              04/13/2022

Annotations:
Update Term date for old records in After load SQL
Read Load File created in the FKEY job
Tfrm_For_VersionId
Load INDV_BE_CCHG_RPLC table
Load rejects are redirected into a Reject file
